properties.name: reactive.http.network.connect-timeout-ms
properties.description: TCP connect timeout in milliseconds. Default: 2000.

properties.name: reactive.http.network.network-read-timeout-ms
properties.description: Netty ReadTimeoutHandler safety-net: fires when no inbound bytes arrive for this duration. Sized well above any per-request timeout. Default: 60000.

properties.name: reactive.http.network.network-write-timeout-ms
properties.description: Netty WriteTimeoutHandler safety-net: fires when no outbound bytes are accepted for this duration. Sized well above any per-request timeout. Default: 60000.

properties.name: reactive.http.network.read-timeout-ms
properties.description: Deprecated alias for network-read-timeout-ms. Use network-read-timeout-ms instead.

properties.name: reactive.http.network.write-timeout-ms
properties.description: Deprecated alias for network-write-timeout-ms. Use network-write-timeout-ms instead.

properties.name: reactive.http.network.connection-pool.max-connections
properties.description: Maximum number of connections in the pool. Default: 200.

properties.name: reactive.http.network.connection-pool.pending-acquire-timeout-ms
properties.description: Maximum time in milliseconds to wait for a connection from the pool before failing. Default: 5000.

properties.name: reactive.http.network.connection-pool.max-idle-time-ms
properties.description: Idle duration in milliseconds after which a pooled connection is evicted. 0 means no idle eviction (Reactor Netty default). Default: 0.

properties.name: reactive.http.network.connection-pool.max-life-time-ms
properties.description: Maximum lifetime in milliseconds of a pooled connection. 0 means unlimited (Reactor Netty default). Default: 0.

properties.name: reactive.http.network.connection-pool.evict-in-background-ms
properties.description: Interval in milliseconds at which the pool sweeps for evictable connections. 0 disables background eviction. Default: 0.

properties.name: reactive.http.network.connection-pool.metrics-enabled
properties.description: When true, publishes Reactor Netty pool gauges (reactor.netty.connection.provider.*) to the MeterRegistry. Requires micrometer-core. Default: false.

properties.name: reactive.http.network.proxy.type
properties.description: Proxy protocol type. Set to NONE to explicitly bypass a global proxy for one client. Default: HTTP.

properties.name: reactive.http.network.proxy.host
properties.description: Proxy host name or IP address.

properties.name: reactive.http.network.proxy.port
properties.description: Proxy port number.

properties.name: reactive.http.network.proxy.username
properties.description: Optional proxy authentication username.

properties.name: reactive.http.network.proxy.password
properties.description: Optional proxy authentication password.

properties.name: reactive.http.network.proxy.non-proxy-hosts
properties.description: Java regex pattern for hosts that bypass the proxy (pipe-separated alternatives). Example: localhost|.*\.internal.

properties.name: reactive.http.network.tls.trust-store
properties.description: Path to the truststore (classpath:, file:, or absolute). Resolved via Spring's DefaultResourceLoader.

properties.name: reactive.http.network.tls.trust-store-password
properties.description: Password for the truststore.

properties.name: reactive.http.network.tls.trust-store-type
properties.description: Truststore format. Default: PKCS12.

properties.name: reactive.http.network.tls.key-store
properties.description: Path to the keystore for mTLS client certificate (classpath:, file:, or absolute).

properties.name: reactive.http.network.tls.key-store-password
properties.description: Password for the keystore.

properties.name: reactive.http.network.tls.key-store-type
properties.description: Keystore format. Default: PKCS12.

properties.name: reactive.http.network.tls.protocols
properties.description: Allowed TLS protocol versions (e.g. TLSv1.3, TLSv1.2). Empty list means JDK defaults.

properties.name: reactive.http.network.tls.ciphers
properties.description: Allowed TLS cipher suites. Empty list means JDK defaults.

properties.name: reactive.http.network.tls.insecure-trust-all
properties.description: Disables certificate verification — NEVER use in production. Logs a WARN when enabled. Default: false.

properties.name: reactive.http.clients
properties.description: Per-client configuration map. Keys are the logical client names used in @ReactiveHttpClient(name=...).

properties.name: reactive.http.clients.[name].base-url
properties.description: Base URL for this client (e.g. https://api.example.com).

properties.name: reactive.http.clients.[name].codec-max-in-memory-size-mb
properties.description: Maximum in-memory codec buffer size in MiB for response decoding. Default: 2.

properties.name: reactive.http.clients.[name].compression-enabled
properties.description: Enable HTTP response compression (Accept-Encoding: gzip). Default: false.

properties.name: reactive.http.clients.[name].log-exchange
properties.description: Enable structured HTTP exchange logging (request + response) for all methods on this client. Default: false.

properties.name: reactive.http.clients.[name].log-body
properties.description: Deprecated. Use log-exchange instead.

properties.name: reactive.http.clients.[name].auth-provider
properties.description: Bean name of the AuthProvider to inject for this client. Leave empty to disable automatic auth. Default: empty.

properties.name: reactive.http.clients.[name].resilience.enabled
properties.description: Master switch for Resilience4j operators (retry, circuit-breaker, bulkhead, timeout) on this client. Default: false.

properties.name: reactive.http.clients.[name].resilience.circuit-breaker
properties.description: Name of the Resilience4j CircuitBreaker instance from application config. Default: default.

properties.name: reactive.http.clients.[name].resilience.retry
properties.description: Name of the Resilience4j Retry instance from application config. Default: default.

properties.name: reactive.http.clients.[name].resilience.retry-methods
properties.description: HTTP methods eligible for retry. Values are upper-cased. Default: [GET, HEAD].

properties.name: reactive.http.clients.[name].resilience.bulkhead
properties.description: Name of the Resilience4j Bulkhead instance from application config. Default: default.

properties.name: reactive.http.clients.[name].resilience.timeout-ms
properties.description: Per-request response timeout in milliseconds applied via HttpClientRequest.responseTimeout(). 0 disables the timeout. Default: 0.

properties.name: reactive.http.clients.[name].pool.max-connections
properties.description: Per-client connection pool max connections override. Overrides the global pool when set.

properties.name: reactive.http.clients.[name].pool.pending-acquire-timeout-ms
properties.description: Per-client pending acquire timeout override in milliseconds.

properties.name: reactive.http.clients.[name].pool.max-idle-time-ms
properties.description: Per-client idle eviction timeout override in milliseconds. 0 means no idle eviction.

properties.name: reactive.http.clients.[name].pool.max-life-time-ms
properties.description: Per-client connection max lifetime override in milliseconds. 0 means unlimited.

properties.name: reactive.http.clients.[name].pool.evict-in-background-ms
properties.description: Per-client background eviction interval override in milliseconds. 0 disables background eviction.

properties.name: reactive.http.clients.[name].pool.metrics-enabled
properties.description: Per-client pool metrics override. When true, publishes Reactor Netty pool gauges to the MeterRegistry.

properties.name: reactive.http.clients.[name].proxy.type
properties.description: Per-client proxy type override. Set to NONE to bypass a global proxy for this client.

properties.name: reactive.http.clients.[name].proxy.host
properties.description: Per-client proxy host override.

properties.name: reactive.http.clients.[name].proxy.port
properties.description: Per-client proxy port override.

properties.name: reactive.http.clients.[name].proxy.username
properties.description: Per-client proxy authentication username override.

properties.name: reactive.http.clients.[name].proxy.password
properties.description: Per-client proxy authentication password override.

properties.name: reactive.http.clients.[name].proxy.non-proxy-hosts
properties.description: Per-client non-proxy hosts regex override.

properties.name: reactive.http.clients.[name].tls.trust-store
properties.description: Per-client truststore path override.

properties.name: reactive.http.clients.[name].tls.trust-store-password
properties.description: Per-client truststore password override.

properties.name: reactive.http.clients.[name].tls.trust-store-type
properties.description: Per-client truststore format override. Default: PKCS12.

properties.name: reactive.http.clients.[name].tls.key-store
properties.description: Per-client keystore path override for mTLS client certificate.

properties.name: reactive.http.clients.[name].tls.key-store-password
properties.description: Per-client keystore password override.

properties.name: reactive.http.clients.[name].tls.key-store-type
properties.description: Per-client keystore format override. Default: PKCS12.

properties.name: reactive.http.clients.[name].tls.protocols
properties.description: Per-client allowed TLS protocol versions override.

properties.name: reactive.http.clients.[name].tls.ciphers
properties.description: Per-client allowed TLS cipher suites override.

properties.name: reactive.http.clients.[name].tls.insecure-trust-all
properties.description: Per-client certificate verification disable override — NEVER use in production.

properties.name: reactive.http.observability.enabled
properties.description: Master switch for all metrics and tracing. Default: true.

properties.name: reactive.http.observability.metric-name
properties.description: Micrometer timer/counter name for outbound HTTP client requests. Default: http.client.requests.

properties.name: reactive.http.observability.include-url-path
properties.description: Include the URL path template as a metric tag. Disable for high-cardinality paths. Default: true.

properties.name: reactive.http.observability.log-request-body
properties.description: Include the request body in span events. Caution: may expose PII or large payloads. Default: false.

properties.name: reactive.http.observability.log-response-body
properties.description: Include the response body in span events. Caution: may expose PII or large payloads. Default: false.

properties.name: reactive.http.observability.health.enabled
properties.description: Enable the Actuator health indicator for reactive HTTP clients. Default: true.

properties.name: reactive.http.observability.health.error-rate-threshold
properties.description: Error ratio threshold [0, 1] above which a client is reported DOWN. Default: 0.5.

properties.name: reactive.http.observability.health.min-samples
properties.description: Minimum probe-interval sample count required before evaluating a client's health. Avoids noisy DOWN status from isolated errors. Default: 10.

properties.name: reactive.http.correlation-id.max-length
properties.description: Maximum accepted length of a correlation-ID value. Values longer than this are dropped. Default: 128.

properties.name: reactive.http.correlation-id.mdc-keys
properties.description: Ordered list of MDC keys consulted by the outbound filter when no correlation-ID is in the Reactor context. First non-blank value wins. Default: [correlationId, X-Correlation-Id, traceId].

properties.name: reactive.http.inbound-headers.allow-list
properties.description: When non-empty, only headers whose names match an entry are captured in the inbound snapshot. Empty means capture everything. Default: [] (capture all).

properties.name: reactive.http.inbound-headers.deny-list
properties.description: Header names whose values are replaced with [REDACTED] in the inbound snapshot before logging. Default: SensitiveHeaders.DEFAULTS (authorization, cookie, set-cookie, proxy-authorization, x-api-key).

values.description: Disable proxy for this client (overrides a global proxy).
Disable proxy for this client (overrides a global proxy).
